title: Review implementation prompts for architectural safety
goal: Harden implementation prompts so agents cannot accidentally create architectural drift.

steps.text: Check that success criteria are falsifiable and observable.
Verify allowed files, forbidden files, stop conditions, and verification steps are explicit and consistent.
Pause for human review when prompt ambiguity could enable architectural drift.
Return a tightened prompt specification with invariant-preserving constraints.

acceptanceCriteria: Allowed and forbidden file scopes are explicit
Stop conditions are clear and enforceable
Verification steps are concrete and observable
Prompt constraints prevent architectural boundary drift

verification.text: Review tightened prompt for contradictory or missing constraints
Confirm constraints prevent IO in Views and boundary violations
